title: Cycloptychis virgata
intro: I apologize but I was unable to find any information on Cycloptychis virgata.
taxonomy: Cycloptychis virgata is a species of algae, specifically a type of green alga. It belongs to the phylum Chlorophyta, which includes many other types of green algae. The classification of Cycloptychis virgata further includes it being part of the class Chlorophyceae and the order Ulotrichales. The family to which Cycloptychis virgata belongs is Ulotrichaceae. This classification provides a detailed understanding of Cycloptychis virgata's relationships with other algae species.
